prompt:
Use the provided structured character specification as the identity source of truth.

Create a professional game character master reference sheet for a persistent story-driven game protagonist.

Character name: dhruv
Character ID: med_f4111f3f
World type: medieval

Target use:
- 3D cutscene-ready character identity reference
- future 2D gameplay sprite generation
- future Veo cutscene consistency

Style direction: fantasy, cloth and leather, ornamental details, grounded medieval silhouette
World/environment flavor: castle halls, stone paths, torch-lit interiors
Character customization: No extra customization provided.
Outfit defaults: tunic or cloak, belted waist, boots, small metal or leather accessories
Props: journal, coin pouch, small blade or trinket

Requirements:
- One single composite master sheet image
- Orthographic-style front view, back view, left side view, right side view
- 3/4 front view, 3/4 back view
- Consistent identical character identity across all views
- Flat or clean cel-shaded presentation, minimal shadows
- Clean white or very light neutral background
- Label each view cleanly
- Include a color palette row at the bottom
- Game-ready, polished, readable layout

Consistency locks: maintain exact facial identity across all outputs; maintain consistent body proportions; maintain consistent hairstyle; maintain consistent costume details; maintain consistent accessories and props unless changed intentionally; preserve the same character identity in 2D sprites and 3D reference outputs
Do not: do not change age drastically; do not change face shape; do not change hair color unless requested; do not replace outfit with a different archetype; do not introduce extra limbs or malformed hands; do not alter glasses or signature accessories; do not drift into a different art style mid-generation
Output exactly one master reference sheet image.
